pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 13: JOB_NAME="Nightly-Quality-Gate" and verifier.py checks this

pi_items.verified_value: Error message text is real Maven error (confirmed via JBoss thread: https://developer.jboss.org/thread/235500), but task setup does NOT trigger it
pi_items.source: Maven error text verified via JBoss documentation. However, setup_task.sh line 98 uses sed to replace '<groupId>org.jenkins-ci.main</groupId>' which does NOT exist in the jenkins-docs/simple-java-maven-app pom.xml (verified via https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jenkins-docs/simple-java-maven-app/master/pom.xml). The pom.xml has groupId 'com.mycompany.app' and NO parent POM section. The sed command will not match anything and the build will NOT fail with the claimed error.
verifier.py line 40: expected_tag = "Regression Start" - matches metadata exactly

privileged_info_summary: The task uses the jenkins-docs/simple-java-maven-app repository from GitHub (https://github.com/jenkins-docs/simple-java-maven-app), which is a real public Maven project with no parent POM. The job name is 'Nightly-Quality-Gate' and the expected tag is 'Regression Start'. However, the task setup attempts to trigger a 'FATAL: Non-resolvable parent POM' error by modifying a parent POM groupId that does not exist in the actual repository's pom.xml. The sed command targets '<groupId>org.jenkins-ci.main</groupId>' which is not present in the project - the actual groupId is 'com.mycompany.app' and there is no parent POM section. Therefore, the build will not fail with the claimed error message, and the task setup is misconfigured.
